title: shader and optimize
description: if u want use shader  for high fps, you should use this modpack.
body:
This modpack provides an easy way to install shaders and optimization mods without setting everything up manually.
 this modpack is made for all players. 
this modpack includes many beautiful and performance-friendly  shaders.

# shaders
 - Bliss Shaders
 - BSL Shaders
 - Complementary Unbound
 - Derivative Shader
 - Fantasy Shaders Unbound
 - Kappa Shader
 - MakeUp Ultra Fast
 - Nostalgia Shader
 - Pastel Shaders
 - Photon Shader
 - Solas Shader

# how to use
 just download modpack and start minecraft.

# versions
- 1.16.5 ( some mods and shaders don't support)
- 1.20.1 

# notes
 ・The graphics settings menu is different from vanilla Minecraft.
 ・If you still experience lag,  pls try removing some shaders.
 ・World generation mods are recommended for the best experience.
